sections.paragraph:
Original: פּגשׁ

Transliteration: pâgash

Phonetic: paw-gash'

BDB Definition:

  1. to meet, join, encounter
    1. (Qal) to meet, encounter
    2. (Niphal) to meet together, meet each other
    3. (Piel) to meet, encounter

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1733

Part(s) of speech: Verb
